steps.title: Use the clue in new images
steps.content: The sentence says Adeyemi made a series of new images for an exhibition by photographing models and layering those photos over cell images. The blank needs a verb meaning produced or made.

steps.title: Reject unrelated actions
steps.content: A means confirmed or proved valid, which is not the action described. C means disputed or contested. D means returned something to an earlier condition, but the images were new. The answer is B.
